calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-20-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name Change.
Dept. 514, Judge: Suzanne Bolanos, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.
Petitioners Mother Linjing Shang present in court. Petition by both parents.
Petitioner Sworn and examined.
Consent of other parent for name change of minors on file.
Proof of Publication on file.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.
The court grants the petition for Chande of Name of minor from Ping Gao to Jessica Ping Gao, and Yuan Gao to Angela Yuan Gao.

DecreeChanging Names signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-18-2012 Reset To Nov-20-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514 For Order To Show Cause
